fields.name: title
fields.description: Title of the checklist; 1-255 characters after entities parsing

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the title. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: title_entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in the title, which can be specified instead of parse_mode. Currently, only bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, spoiler, custom_emoji, and date_time entities are allowed.

fields.name: tasks
fields.description: List of 1-30 tasks in the checklist

fields.name: others_can_add_tasks
fields.description: Pass True if other users can add tasks to the checklist

fields.name: others_can_mark_tasks_as_done
fields.description: Pass True if other users can mark tasks as done or not done in the checklist
